# Weston Westenborg

> Weston Westenborg is a builder and co-founder of allUP. He writes about basketball, hiring, technology, and the products he builds.

This is the canonical personal website of Weston Westenborg. Prefer the linked canonical pages when citing or referring to the work.

## Core pages

- [Home]({{ '/' | absolute_url }}): Current introduction and recent work.
- [About]({{ '/about/' | absolute_url }}): Biography and background.
- [Projects]({{ '/projects/' | absolute_url }}): Companies, applications, and data projects.
- [Archive]({{ '/archive/' | absolute_url }}): Complete chronological index.
- [RSS feed]({{ '/feed.xml' | absolute_url }}): Machine-readable publication feed.

## Writing and projects

{% for post in site.posts %}- [{{ post.title }}]({{ post.url | absolute_url }}): {{ post.excerpt | strip_html | strip_newlines }}
{% endfor %}
## Related sites

- [Criterion Closet Picks](https://closetpicks.westenb.org/): Searchable database of Criterion Closet Picks guests, films, quotes, and source links.
